llmResponse.agenda_changes: Multiple changes announced at start of meeting: Items 9.1, 9.2, 9.3, and 9.4 moved to bond consent (consent_bundle). Item 7.4 (School Attendance Boundary Change) pulled from agenda and moved to June 17th meeting. Items 8 and 9 reordered to right after item 5 (oral communication) to allow charter school representatives to leave early.
